ARXIV_R10_evodevo.text: Evolutionary developmental biology supplies design principles for AI architectures via selection_pressure: minimal genome floors (JCVI-syn3.0 ~473 genes), morphogenetic fields as multi-scale competency architectures, horizontal gene transfer as cross-domain capability borrowing.
ARXIV_R10_evodevo.paper_title: Evolutionary Developmental Biology and AI Paradigm

ARXIV_R10_neuroai.text: NeuroAI bridges neuroscience and AI on capability gaps: cognitive_function axis, biologically-plausible architectures, brain-organoid LLM curricula. AI capability gaps map onto evolved cognitive substrates.
ARXIV_R10_neuroai.paper_title: NeuroAI and Beyond: Bridging Neuroscience and AI

ARXIV_R10_thermodynamics.text: Deep learning of thermodynamic laws: energy_constraint axis. Information-theoretic capacity, phase transitions, free-energy minimization as inductive biases for learning systems.

ARXIV_R10_market_making.text: Market-making mechanisms for multi-agent LLM safety: market_clearing axis, prediction markets and bidding auctions as decentralized aggregation, mechanism design for incentive-compatible coordination between agents.
ARXIV_R10_market_making.paper_title: Market Making for Multi-Agent LLM Safety
